title: yanah #3238
definition:
1) to oppress, suppress, treat violently, maltreat, vex, do wrong
    1a) (Qal) to oppress, suppress
    1b) (Hiphil) to treat violently, maltreat
nasbUsage:

    1a) (Qal) to oppress, suppress

    NASB:  to oppress, maltreat, perh. suppress
